meanings.usage: 形容少见或不普通的事物，强调稀缺性
指很久以前存在的事物，与现代相对
指古代民间传说中关于神、英雄的故事
指造成困难或不便的情况
用于停放汽车的建筑物
用于通知或警告的牌子
指行动或原因产生的结果
形容外观不美丽或不吸引人
与介词to/into连用，表示使某物变成另一种状态

meanings.meaning: 戈耳工（希腊神话中的蛇发女妖）
meanings.usage: 特指希腊神话中能将人变成石头的蛇发三姐妹
指相信某事是真的或某人的话语

examples.en: He parked his car outside the shop.
examples.zh: 他把车停在了商店外面。

phrases.usage: 表示与某人某事有麻烦或纠纷

examples.en: She has trouble with her neighbors.

phrases.usage: 表示张贴、建造或竖起某物

examples.en: They put up a tent in the garden.
examples.zh: 他们在花园里搭起了帐篷。

phrases.usage: 表示变成某种状态或事物
表示从那时起一直到现在

examples.en: He has been ill ever since last week.
examples.zh: 从上周起他就一直生病。

phrases.usage: 表示因为、由于（后接名词或代词）

examples.en: Because of the rain, we stayed at home.
examples.zh: 因为下雨，我们待在家里。

examples.en: The medicine had no effect on him.

phrases.phrase: one of + 最高级 + 复数名词

examples.en: This is one of the most beautiful cities in the world.
examples.zh: 这是世界上最美丽的城市之一。

examples.en: I usually return home at six o'clock.

grammar.title: 现在完成时 (Present Perfect Tense)
grammar.definition: 表示过去发生的行为对现在造成的影响，或从过去开始一直持续到现在的动作
grammar.structure: 主语 + have/has + 过去分词
grammar.usage: 用于描述过去的经验或持续到现在的状态，常与ever since、for、already等连用

examples.en: He has just bought a new house.
He has not been able to get his own car into his garage even once.
examples.zh: 他从未能够把自己的车停进车库。

examples.en: None of them has been turned to stone yet.
examples.zh: 他们中还没有人被变成石头。

grammar.title: 现在完成进行时 (Present Perfect Continuous Tense)
grammar.definition: 表示从过去开始一直持续到现在的动作，可能还在继续
grammar.structure: 主语 + have/has + been + 动词-ing形式
grammar.usage: 强调动作的持续性，常与ever since、for等时间状语连用

examples.en: He has been having trouble with cars and their owners.
examples.zh: 他一直和汽车及车主有麻烦。

grammar.title: because of 与 because 的区别
grammar.definition: because是连词，后接句子；because of是介词短语，后接名词或代词
grammar.structure: because + 句子 / because of + 名词短语
grammar.usage: 两者都表示原因，但语法结构不同

examples.en: Because of this, he has not been able to get his car into the garage.
examples.zh: 因为这个原因，他一直没能把车停进车库。

examples.en: He didn't come because he was ill.

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + has/have + just + 过去分词

original.en: He has just bought a new house in the city.
original.zh: 他刚在城里买了一栋新房子。

imitations.en: She has just finished her homework.
They have just arrived at the station.

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + has/have not been able to + 动词原形

original.en: He has not been able to get his own car into his garage even once.
original.zh: 他从未能够把自己的车停进车库。

imitations.en: She has not been able to sleep well lately.
I have not been able to contact him.

sentencePatterns.pattern: It is one of the + 最高级 + 复数名词 + I have ever seen/met

original.en: It is one of the ugliest faces I have ever seen.
original.zh: 这是我见过的最丑陋的脸之一。

imitations.en: This is one of the most interesting books I have ever read.
imitations.zh: 这是我读过的最有趣的书之一。

imitations.en: She is one of the kindest people I have ever met.
imitations.zh: 她是我见过的最善良的人之一。

sentencePatterns.pattern: None of + 复数名词 + has/have + 过去分词 + yet

original.en: But none of them has been turned to stone yet!
original.zh: 但他们中还没有人被变成石头！

imitations.en: None of the students has finished the exam yet.
imitations.zh: 还没有一个学生完成考试。

imitations.en: None of the letters has been replied to yet.
